name: Center Silk Reference in Courtyard
description: Moves every F/B.Silkscreen reference to its courtyard centroid with rotation, pad nudging and text scaling.
description_full:
v1.2: Rotation control — match footprint rotation, always 0°, or keep existing.

v1.1: Settings dialog before each run lets you choose scope (all or selected footprints), board side (front, back, or both), automatic text scale-down to fit inside the courtyard (with a configurable minimum height), pad-collision nudging that shifts the text away from pad copper, and optional CSV export of skipped footprints.

The entire operation is committed as a single undo transaction — one Ctrl+Z reverses all moves. Back-side footprints (B.Courtyard / B.Silkscreen) are fully supported.
